stemHtml: When determining the accelerate stop distance for a performance class A aeroplane. The available reverse thrust of the operative engine(s) ...

options.a: is taken into account on a wet runway.
options.b: is NOT allowed to be used due to the risk of thrust asymmetry.
options.c: has NO effect on accelerated stop distance, regardless of the runway conditions.
options.d: is taken into account on a dry runway.
